welcome.subtitle: Simplify your daily commute: find the offer suited to your profile, upload your documents and pay online — no appointment needed.

benefits.speed_desc: Enter your profile and usage, we'll find the most suitable offer for you.
benefits.paperless_desc: Upload your supporting documents online: everything is digital and secure.
benefits.payment_desc: Credit card, direct debit or mobile payment, with complete confidence.

welcome.banner_subtitle: The subscription process takes less than 5 minutes.

profile.title: What is your current situation?
profile.subtitle: Select the option that best describes you.

minor_block.title: This pass is reserved for under-16s
minor_block.text: Minors cannot subscribe directly. A parent must create the account.
minor_block.cta_parent: I'm the parent → Create an account for my child
minor_block.cta_existing: I already have a child account — Sign in

frequency.title: How often do you travel?
frequency.subtitle: This will help us suggest the most suitable subscription for your needs.

offer.title: Recommended offer for you!
offer.subtitle: Based on your criteria, here is the offer that best suits you:

navigo-annuel.name: Navigo Annual
navigo-annuel.desc: For people who travel less frequently or outside the region.
navigo-annuel.eligibility: Open to everyone, no income or age conditions.

imagine-r-etudiant.name: Imagine R Student
imagine-r-etudiant.desc: The essential pass for students in Île-de-France.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network
imagine-r-etudiant.eligibility: Reserved for students under 26 in Île-de-France.

imagine-r-scolaire.name: Imagine R Schoolchild
imagine-r-scolaire.desc: The annual pass for primary, secondary school pupils and apprentices.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network
imagine-r-scolaire.eligibility: Reserved for primary/secondary school pupils and apprentices under 26.

imagine-r-junior.name: Imagine R Junior
imagine-r-junior.desc: Imagine R at an unbeatable price for children under 11.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network

amethyste.name: Améthyste
amethyste.desc: Free travel for seniors, disabled adults, those unfit for work, war veterans or war widows.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network
amethyste.eligibility: Subject to conditions: 62+, disability, unfitness for work, war veteran or war widow status.

navigo-senior.name: Navigo Senior
navigo-senior.desc: 50% off the Navigo Annual pass for seniors.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network
navigo-senior.eligibility: Reserved for people over 62, subject to conditions.

tst.name: TST
tst.desc: Social and Solidarity Pricing, subject to income conditions.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network
tst.eligibility: Subject to income conditions. Application reviewed within 48h after submitting documents.

reduction-50.name: 50% Reduction
reduction-50.desc: The 50% reduction for beneficiaries of State Medical Aid.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network
reduction-50.eligibility: Reserved for beneficiaries of State Medical Aid (AME).

solidarite-75.name: Solidarity 75%
solidarite-75.desc: The solidarity reduction for beneficiaries of social aid.
solidarite-75.eligibility: Subject to income conditions, all zones included.

solidarite-gratuite.name: Solidarity Free
solidarite-gratuite.desc: Free travel throughout Île-de-France for beneficiaries of social aid.
solidarite-gratuite.eligibility: Free, renewable every 3 months. All zones included.

handicap.name: Disability
handicap.desc: 50% reduction or free travel for people with disabilities.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network
handicap.eligibility: Subject to conditions related to disability rate or mobility inclusion card.

accompagnant-handicap.name: Disability Companion
accompagnant-handicap.desc: Get the reduction or free pass for your companion.
perks: Access to the entire Île-de-France network
accompagnant-handicap.eligibility: Reserved for the companion of a person with a disability, subject to conditions.

liberte-plus.name: Liberté+
liberte-plus.desc: Pay only for your trips, with no commitment.
liberte-plus.eligibility: No commitment, open to everyone, billed per actual trip.

documents.title: Create your application file
documents.subtitle: We need some information to finalise your subscription.

identite.label: Identity card
identite.hint: JPG, PNG or PDF, max 5 MB

bourse.label: Scholarship certificate
bourse.hint: If you are a scholarship holder

payment.title: Secure payment
payment.subtitle: Choose your payment method to finalise your subscription.

success.title: Your subscription is now active!
success.subtitle: A summary has been sent to your email.

verification.title: One last step!
verification.subtitle: Your account is not yet activated. A new 6-character code has just been sent to your email.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Sign up to configure your Île-de-France Mobilités Connect ID.

verification.title: Code sent!
verification.subtitle: To complete your registration, please enter the 6-character code sent to

success.title: Account verified successfully!
success.subtitle: Your profile is ready to use. You can now log in.

errors.terms_required: You must accept the terms and conditions and the privacy policy.
errors.server: Unable to reach the backend server.
errors.invalid_code: The entered code is invalid or expired.
